untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern detection requires multi-bar chart pattern recognition (identifying two valleys, confirmation line/horizontal support level, and comparing volume between left and right bottoms). These are visual/structural pattern properties that cannot be expressed using point-in-time indicator values and the allowed operators. The signal requires pattern shape analysis and relative positioning of multiple swing points, which is beyond the scope of single-bar indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Partially translated entry conditions using available volume indicators: volume breakout above 30-day average (sma_20) and vol_ratio_20 > 1.0 to approximate 'slightly above average' breakout volume. The core pattern recognition (two valleys, their positioning relative to support, relative volume on left vs right bottom) cannot be captured without custom pattern detection logic. Exit condition uses pivot as a proxy for support level breach, but this is a simplification. A proper backtest of this signal would require a dedicated double-bottom pattern detector.
